content.en:
The Lord of the Blood Night was very depressed, he honestly cultivated in his palace, and as a result, he suffered an unwarranted disaster.

"Who deliberately framed me?"

He didn't dare to find trouble with Chaotian Holy Mountain, he just wanted to find out who broke into Zhonghaiyuan disguised as him.

Unfortunately, he couldn't find it.

......

Wind Tooth Island.

Chen Yang returned here and began his retreat.

"There are a lot of sea abyss sand found this time, which should make my other shore origin skyrocket!"

Subsequently, he began to use the sea abyss sand to improve his origin on the other side.

The years passed.

Ye Tian's other shore origin is getting stronger and stronger, and I have to say that the effect of Haiyuan Sand is still quite good.

With so much Haiyuan Sand, there should be no problem in raising his cultivation to the late stage of the Origin Upper Realm.

100,000 primeval eras!

200,000 primeval eras!

300,000 primeval era!

Before you know it, 500,000 primeval eras have passed.

Over the years, Ye Tian had been refining the sea abyss sand, and the origin on the other side was getting stronger and stronger.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body began to transform, and his body became more powerful, which was the cultivation that had once again crossed a level and reached the late stage of the Origin Upper Realm.

For many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors, a mere 500,000 primeval era was only a short period of time.

Breaking through to the late stage of the Origin Upper Realm in such a short period of time is simply extremely fast.

However, if you want to break through to the peak of the Origin Upper Realm in the late stage of the Origin Upper Realm, it is extremely difficult, and the years it takes are simply unimaginable.

Of course.

If he could break through the Origin Rule on the other side, it would be easy.

But it is too difficult to continue to improve the origin rules of the other side from the ninety-five realm.

After a period of time, it was relatively calm, and Ye Tian slowly cultivated.

It's just that Hai Yuansha's effect on him has slowed down, causing his cultivation to become more difficult to improve.

And his other replica bodies are also looking for resources everywhere, but their strength is still improving slowly.

......

Terran Sanctuary.

Ye Tian's replica body has been sitting here for a long time, and now the strength of the human race is much stronger than in the past, and more than ten Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors have been born alone, but most of them are ordinary Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and there is still only one Ye Xingchen on the other side.

Of course.

In the Bloody Domain, the Terran Sacred Pavilion had already surpassed the Ancient Heng Mountain, the Ancient Demon Sea, the Taidu Realm, and the True Beast Alliance, and was a well-deserved number one top force.

In addition, he is the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm, and no one dares to provoke the Terran Holy Pavilion.

Ye Tian didn't want the human race to go to the central part either, so he just had to be a gangster in the seventy-two domains in the east.

So, he doesn't worry much about it now.

this day.

"The Lord of the Stormfangs has notified me of a meeting?"

Ye Tian immediately came to the palace of the Lord of the Wind Fangs.

The Lord of Ice and Rain, the Lord of Qin Sound, and the Lord of Cave Mystery are all here.

The five Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Wind Tooth Island gathered together.

Seeing that everyone was coming, the Lord of the Wind Fang said: "Everyone, I have one thing to inform you, the Ancient Heavenly Palace has sent invitations to many forces, inviting the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm to explore a treasure land, and if it falls, it will give some compensation to the forces where it is. If you survive, half of the resources will be used as a reward!"

"Half of the resources as a reward, so good?"

The Lord of the Cave was surprised.

You must know that the treasure land that can be explored by many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors must be very extraordinary, if you find a lot of treasures, even if you can only take half of them, it is an unimaginable resource!

Especially the treasure land that has just been explored, not to mention the resources everywhere, but there are definitely a lot of them.

Under normal circumstances, such benefits do not fall on other forces.

Therefore, the Lord of the Cave Mystery was also able to guess that this time the danger was not small.

The Lord of the Wind Teeth also said: "The danger must be great this time, I am not prepared to go, if any of you want to go, I will not stop it." In short, I will tell you that it is your choice whether to go or not. "

"I'll go!"

Ye Tian said without hesitation.

He has copied a lot of bodies, and he is not afraid of falling, so he naturally wants to go!

"I'm going to go, too!" said the Lord of Ice Rain.

"Lord of Ice and Rain, are you sure you want to go?" the Lord of the Wind Fang looked at the Lord of Ice and Rain, very surprised.

Ye Tian was going, and he was not surprised.

After all, Ye Tian's strength is very strong, from the point of view of cultivation, he is already in the late stage of the Origin Upper Realm, and this kind of improvement speed is too terrifying!

Moreover, he also knew that Ye Tian's life-saving ability must have a lot of secrets, so he was not worried.

But the main cultivation of Ice Rain is not as good as Ye Tian now, and if he goes, it will be very dangerous.

At this time, the Lord of Ice and Rain said: "Lord of Wind Fang, I have a means to save my life, and exploring the treasure land must be free to explore, I will not go too deep, and the danger should not be too great." "

"Okay, you can contact the Ancient Heavenly Palace yourself. "Lord of the Wind Fangs.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Ice and Rain contacted the Ancient Heavenly Palace together, and the Ancient Heavenly Palace immediately agreed.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Ice and Rain went to the Ancient Heavenly Palace in the middle.

Ye Tian didn't know much about the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, he only knew that the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace was one of the nine hegemon-level forces in the central part of the country, and its strength seemed to be stronger than that of Chaotian Holy Mountain.

Because of this, the Ancient Heavenly Palace had to attract some Origin Upper Realm Exploration Treasure Lands to attract a lot of forces.

After some time.

Ye Tian and the Lord of Ice and Rain arrived at the Ancient Heavenly Palace.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as he came to the Ancient Heavenly Palace, the aura of the Origin Ascending Realm came here.

Then.

Ye Tian saw another acquaintance - the Lord of the Blood Night.

"The Lord of the Bloody Night is here!"

The last time he pitted the Lord of the Bloody Night, he also inquired about the information, and knew that the Lord of the Bloody Night was beaten by the Chaotian Holy Mountain, and it is estimated that the Lord of the Bloody Night was extremely angry!

At this time.

The Lord of the Blood Night saw Ye Tian and was immediately surprised when he saw that Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the Origin Upper Realm.

"This Endless Major has improved so quickly, and it has surpassed me in terms of cultivation!!!

The Lord of the Bloody Night looked incredulous.

He knew how difficult it was to improve his cultivation, if he didn't have a great opportunity, his physical body was very strong, and the Origin Rule Realm on the other side was high, otherwise he wouldn't be able to reach the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor combat power.

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Blood Night didn't talk anything, they didn't speak to each other.

As time passed, more and more Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors arrived here.

After some time, a Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Ancient Heavenly Palace appeared.

"I've seen the Desolate Blood Ancestor!"

A Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Upper Realm said respectfully.

The Desolate Blood Ancestor is one of the overlords of the Origin Upper Realm of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, and his strength is very strong, and he is also presiding over this treasure land exploration.
